questionHtml:
Two reactions of the Krebs cycle are shown.

What type of reactions are isocitrate and oxalosuccinate undergoing?

meta.title: Two reactions of the Krebs cycle are shown. What type of reactions are isocitrate and oxalosuccinate undergoing?
breadcrumbLabels: C1.2.12. Oxidation and decarboxylation of acetyl groups in the Krebs cycle with a yield of ATP and reduced NAD
